questions: 🧺 Meera picks 23 mangoes from one tree and 18 from another. Rohan picks 15 from a third tree. They want to fill baskets of 10. How many full baskets can they fill?	(Q1)
🎒 Aarav has 34 marbles and Bhavya has 27 marbles. Their friend Charu gives them 19 more. If they pack 20 marbles per bag, how many full bags can they make?	(Q2)
📦 A shopkeeper had 45 oranges in the morning. He got a delivery of 38 more in the afternoon and another of 17 in the evening. How many oranges does he have now?	(Q3)
🏫 Class A has 32 students, Class B has 29 students, and Class C has 34 students. If they all sit in rows of 5, how many full rows will there be?	(Q4)
💐 Kavya planted 16 rose plants in the first row, 24 in the second, and 20 in the third. She wants to water groups of 6 plants at a time. How many groups will she water?	(Q5)
🍎 Deepak bought 25 apples on Monday, 18 on Wednesday, and 37 on Friday. He packs 8 apples in each box. How many full boxes can he pack?	(Q6)
📚 Farida read 14 pages on Day 1, 22 pages on Day 2, and 19 pages on Day 3. Her book has 100 pages. How many more pages does she need to read to finish?	(Q7)
🪁 Girish has 47 kite sticks. Hari gives him 28 more and Ishita gives 25 more. If each kite needs 3 sticks, how many kites can he make?	(Q8)
🥭 Jaya's orchard has 56 mango trees, 34 banana trees, and 10 coconut trees. A storm destroyed 15 trees. How many trees remain?	(Q9)
💧 Kavitha fills 3 buckets. The first holds 12 litres, the second 18 litres, and the third 15 litres. She pours them into a tank that already has 20 litres. How many litres are in the tank now?	(Q10)
🧁 Lakshmi baked 24 cupcakes, her mother baked 36, and her sister baked 12. They put 9 cupcakes in each box. How many full boxes did they fill?	(Q11)
🏏 Mohan scored 43 runs in the first match, 29 in the second, and 38 in the third. His teammate Neeraj scored 50 in total. Who scored more and by how much?	(Q12)
🐄 A farmer has 18 cows in one shed, 23 in another, and 19 in a third. He sells 12 cows. How many cows does he have left?	(Q13)
🚂 A train carries 125 passengers from Station A. At Station B, 48 more board and 35 get off. How many passengers are on the train now?	(Q14)
🌻 Omkar plants sunflowers in 3 rows: 15, 22, and 13 plants. He then plants the same number again in 3 more rows. How many sunflower plants does he have in all?	(Q15)
🎨 Priya uses 18 red beads, 27 blue beads, and 15 green beads for a necklace. Each necklace uses 60 beads. How many more beads does she need?	(Q16)
🍰 Rajan's bakery sold 56 cakes on Saturday and 74 cakes on Sunday. If each cake costs 50 rupees, how much money did he earn over the weekend?	(Q17)
📬 Seema received 12 letters on Monday, 19 on Tuesday, and 9 on Wednesday. She replied to 25 letters. How many are still unanswered?	(Q18)
🌾 Three farmers harvested wheat: Tarun got 48 kg, Uma got 35 kg, Vimal got 27 kg. They share equally among themselves. How many kg does each get?	(Q19)
🐟 An aquarium has 34 goldfish, 22 guppies, and 14 tetras. The owner adds 10 more of each type. How many fish are there now?	(Q20)
🎁 Wrina wrapped 16 gifts on Friday, 24 on Saturday, and 20 on Sunday. She used 4 ribbons per gift. How many ribbons did she use in total?	(Q21)
🏠 A builder used 250 bricks on Day 1, 320 bricks on Day 2, and 180 on Day 3. He ordered 1000 bricks in total. How many bricks are left unused?	(Q22)
🧃 Xena's juice stall sold 45 glasses in the morning and 65 in the evening. If each glass costs 15 rupees, how much did she earn?	(Q23)
🧸 Yuvraj has 38 small toys and 27 big toys. He donates 15 toys. How many toys does he have now?	(Q24)
🌸 Zara counted 42 red flowers and 38 yellow flowers in the garden. Bees visited 1 in every 4 flowers. How many flowers did bees visit?	(Q25)
🍱 Aditya packed 35 lunch boxes for his class and 45 for another class. If each box had 2 rotis, how many rotis were packed in total?	(Q26)
⚽ Bhumi scored 8 goals in March, 11 in April, and 6 in May. Her teammate scored 20 goals in the same period. How many goals did both score together?	(Q27)
🎶 Chetan practised music for 25 minutes on Monday, 40 on Tuesday, and 35 on Wednesday. His goal is 2 hours a week. How many more minutes does he need?	(Q28)
🌍 Darsh collected 50 stickers of animals, 30 of countries, and 40 of birds. He pasted 6 per page in his album. How many pages did he fill?	(Q29)
🧪 Ekta mixed 150 ml of water, 80 ml of juice, and 70 ml of syrup in a jug. The jug holds 400 ml. How much more liquid can it hold?	(Q30)
📚 The school library had 120 books. On Monday 35 were borrowed, and on Tuesday 28 more were borrowed. How many books remain in the library?	(Q31)
💰 Farhan had 500 rupees. He spent 175 rupees on stationery and 120 rupees on snacks. How much money does he have left?	(Q32)
🍎 A fruit seller had 90 apples. He sold 34 in the morning and 28 in the evening. How many apples are left?	(Q33)
🌳 A park had 75 trees. A storm uprooted 12 trees and 8 more were cut for road widening. How many trees are left?	(Q34)
🏏 Gita's team needed 150 runs to win. They scored 67 in the first half and 48 in the second half. How many more runs do they need?	(Q35)
🎈 Harish blew up 60 balloons for a party. 14 burst in the morning and 9 burst in the evening. How many balloons are intact?	(Q36)
🥛 A dairy had 200 litres of milk in the morning. They sold 85 litres by noon and 62 litres by evening. How much milk is left?	(Q37)
🦋 Ila counted 95 butterflies in the garden. 23 flew away in the afternoon and 17 more at sunset. How many butterflies are still in the garden?	(Q38)
🏫 Jeevan's school had 340 students. 45 left at the end of the year and 28 more transferred. New admissions added 60 students. How many students are there now?	(Q39)
🚗 A parking lot had 80 cars. 25 left in the morning, 18 in the afternoon. Later, 10 more cars arrived. How many cars are in the lot now?	(Q40)
🧩 Kavitha had 200 puzzle pieces. She lost 15 under the sofa and 8 were damaged. How many usable puzzle pieces does she have?	(Q41)
🍰 A bakery made 150 pastries. 67 were sold in the morning and 49 in the evening. How many are left for the next day?	(Q42)
🐓 A poultry farm had 180 hens. 35 were sold and 20 were given away. How many hens are left?	(Q43)
⛽ A petrol tank had 60 litres. Mohan used 22 litres on Monday and 18 on Tuesday. How much petrol is left?	(Q44)
🧵 Neela had 500 cm of thread. She used 175 cm for a sweater and 135 cm for a scarf. How much thread is left?	(Q45)
💊 A medical store had 250 tablets. They sold 80 in the morning and 95 in the evening. How many tablets are left?	(Q46)
🐑 Omkar had 64 sheep. 15 strayed away and 9 were sold. A farmer gifted him 7 more. How many sheep does Omkar have now?	(Q47)
📏 A plank of wood is 300 cm long. The carpenter cut 85 cm for a shelf and 65 cm for a table. How much wood is left?	(Q48)
🎯 Pavan attempted 50 questions in a test. He got 12 wrong and left 8 unattempted. How many questions did he answer correctly?	(Q49)
🚌 A bus started with 55 passengers. At the first stop 18 got off and 12 got on. At the second stop 9 got off. How many are on the bus now?	(Q50)
🧴 Radha had 750 ml of shampoo. She used 120 ml in week 1 and 95 ml in week 2. How much shampoo is left?	(Q51)
🌽 A farmer had 300 kg of corn. He sold 85 kg to one shop and 110 kg to another. How much corn is left?	(Q52)
📱 Sanya's phone had 100% battery. She used 35% watching videos and 28% on calls. What is the battery percentage left?	(Q53)
🎪 A circus sold 500 tickets. 230 were sold in the morning and 195 in the evening. How many tickets are unsold?	(Q54)
🏋️ Tanay's target is to do 100 push-ups a day. He did 38 in the morning and 29 in the afternoon. How many more must he do?	(Q55)
🌊 A swimming pool holds 1000 litres. 320 litres evaporated in summer and 145 litres were drained for cleaning. How much water is left?	(Q56)
🎃 Usha had 80 sweets. She gave 24 to her class and 18 to her neighbours. How many sweets does she have now?	(Q57)
🧲 Varun had 120 magnets. He gave 45 to his brother and bought 20 more. How many magnets does he have?	(Q58)
🌿 A garden had 90 plants. 22 dried up in summer and 13 were replanted elsewhere. Wina added 15 new plants. How many plants are there now?	(Q59)
🏡 Xena's water tank holds 500 litres. She used 135 litres on Monday and 180 litres on Tuesday. How much water is left?	(Q60)
🎁 Priya is packing return gifts for 8 friends. Each bag needs 4 chocolates and 3 stickers. How many chocolates and stickers does she need in total?	(Q61)
🚌 A school has 6 buses. Each bus has 9 rows, and each row seats 4 students. How many students can travel in all the buses?	(Q62)
🍪 Anaya bakes 5 trays of cookies. Each tray has 4 rows and each row has 6 cookies. How many cookies does she bake in all?	(Q63)
📦 A warehouse has 7 shelves. Each shelf holds 8 boxes, and each box contains 9 items. How many items are there in total?	(Q64)
🏫 A school has 9 classes. Each class has 5 benches, and each bench seats 6 students. How many students are there in all?	(Q65)
🪴 Bharat plants 6 rows of flower pots on his terrace. Each row has 7 pots. Each pot needs 3 cups of water daily. How many cups of water does he need per day?	(Q66)
🧁 Charu bakes cupcakes for 5 days. Each day she bakes 4 batches. Each batch makes 8 cupcakes. How many cupcakes does she bake in all?	(Q67)
🎨 Deepa makes greeting cards. She makes 7 cards each day for 6 days. She uses 4 stickers on each card. How many stickers does she use?	(Q68)
🌽 Eshan's farm has 8 fields. Each field has 9 rows of corn plants. Each row has 7 plants. How many corn plants are there?	(Q69)
🏏 Farida's cricket team plays 6 matches. Each match lasts 4 hours and each hour she bowls 6 overs. How many overs did she bowl in all?	(Q70)
🎒 Girish packs school bags for 9 students. Each bag has 3 notebooks. Each notebook has 60 pages. How many pages are there in all?	(Q71)
🕯️ Harini places candles on 5 tables for a celebration. Each table has 4 candle stands and each stand holds 3 candles. How many candles are there in all?	(Q72)
🐔 Ila's poultry has 7 coops. Each coop has 6 hens. Each hen lays 5 eggs per week. How many eggs does she get in a week?	(Q73)
🪁 Jatin makes kite frames. Each frame needs 4 sticks of bamboo. He makes 8 kites a day for 5 days. How many bamboo sticks does he need?	(Q74)
🎶 Kavya practises piano for 45 minutes every day. She practises for 6 days a week. How many minutes does she practise in 4 weeks?	(Q75)
🧃 Lakshmi makes juice boxes. Each box holds 200 ml. She makes 6 boxes a day. How much juice does she make in 5 days?	(Q76)
🛒 Mohan buys 4 packets of biscuits each week. Each packet has 8 biscuits and costs 12 rupees. How much does he spend in 3 weeks?	(Q77)
🌺 Neha plants 5 rows of marigolds. Each row has 8 plants. Each plant blooms into 6 flowers. How many flowers are there?	(Q78)
🏊 Omkar swims 8 laps a day. Each lap is 25 metres. How many metres does he swim in 6 days?	(Q79)
🎠 A merry-go-round has 6 seats. It runs 8 rounds per hour. A fair runs for 5 hours. How many seat-rounds happen in total?	(Q80)
🪞 Pari tiles a bathroom floor. Each row has 7 tiles and there are 9 rows. Each tile costs 25 rupees. How much does the tiling cost?	(Q81)
🌾 Rajan's wheat farm yields 45 kg per row. He has 6 rows in each of 4 sections. How many kg of wheat does he harvest?	(Q82)
🧸 Seema sews toy bears. Each bear needs 3 buttons for eyes and nose. She makes 7 bears a day for 8 days. How many buttons does she need?	(Q83)
🚲 Tanay delivers newspapers. He covers 3 streets each morning. Each street has 9 houses. He charges 5 rupees per house. How much does he earn daily?	(Q84)
🎪 Uma's juggling show runs 4 times a day for 7 days. Each show has 5 jugglers and each juggler uses 6 balls. How many balls are used in total?	(Q85)
🐝 Varun has 5 beehives. Each hive has 8 combs. Each comb has 9 hexagons filled with honey. How many hexagons are filled?	(Q86)
📐 Wina cuts rectangles from a sheet. Each rectangle is 6 cm long and 4 cm wide. She cuts 9 such rectangles. What is the total area?	(Q87)
🏺 Xavi makes clay pots. He makes 6 pots a day. He sells each pot for 35 rupees. How much does he earn in 2 weeks?	(Q88)
🐠 Yamini's fish tank has 4 sections. Each section holds 7 fish. Each fish eats 3 pellets twice a day. How many pellets are needed daily?	(Q89)
🌙 Zubin counts stars for 5 nights. Each night he spots 8 clusters. Each cluster has 9 stars. How many stars does he count in all?	(Q90)
🍪 Grandma baked 48 cookies and wants to share them equally among 4 families. The Sharma family has 3 children who share their portion equally. How many cookies does each Sharma child get?	(Q91)
🏫 A school orders 180 notebooks for 6 classes. Each class divides their notebooks equally among 5 groups. How many notebooks does each group get?	(Q92)
🌾 A farmer harvests 360 kg of rice. He packs it equally into 9 sacks. Each sack is then split equally between 4 families. How many kg does each family get?	(Q93)
🎒 A donor gives 240 pencils to a school. The principal divides them equally among 8 classes. Each class then divides theirs equally among 5 students. How many pencils does each student get?	(Q94)
🍕 A canteen makes 96 rotis for lunch. They serve 4 tables equally. Each table then shares equally among 6 students. How many rotis does each student get?	(Q95)
💰 Anita saves 540 rupees in 6 weeks. She spends equal amounts each week. How much does she spend in 3 weeks?	(Q96)
🎨 Bhavna has 280 beads. She divides them equally into 7 boxes. She then takes out 3 boxes for a project. How many beads does she use?	(Q97)
🧩 Chirag has a puzzle with 500 pieces. He completes 100 pieces equally across 5 days. Then the next 200 pieces equally across 4 days. How many pieces per day in total on day 1?	(Q98)
🚗 A transport company drives 630 km in 7 days. Each day, they make 3 equal trips. How many km is each trip?	(Q99)
🐄 A dairy produces 420 litres of milk in a week. Equal amounts are produced each day. Each day's milk is packed equally into 6 cans. How many litres per can?	(Q100)
📚 A library receives 504 books. It divides them equally among 7 sections. Each section arranges their books equally across 9 shelves. How many books per shelf?	(Q101)
🌺 Divya collects 350 flowers. She puts them in 7 equal bunches and then ties each bunch with a string every 10 flowers. How many strings does she use in total?	(Q102)
🧁 Ekta bakes 288 muffins in 4 days equally. Each day she packs them into boxes of 9. How many boxes does she fill each day?	(Q103)
🎈 For a school event, 480 balloons are to be divided equally among 6 stalls. Each stall hangs them in groups of 8. How many groups per stall?	(Q104)
🌾 Farmer Gopal harvests 450 coconuts over 9 days equally. He sells them in bunches of 5. How many bunches does he sell per day?	(Q105)
🏊 Hemal swims 560 metres in 7 sessions. Each session he swims equal lengths of 8 metres. How many lengths does he swim per session?	(Q106)
🧸 Ira has 270 buttons for sewing toys. Each toy needs 6 buttons. She finishes the job in 9 days equally. How many toys does she make per day?	(Q107)
🚂 A train covers 720 km in 9 hours. If it travels equal distance per hour, how far does it go in 4 hours?	(Q108)
🌻 Jeevan plants 630 seeds across 9 rows equally. He wants to water half the rows today. How many seeds are in the rows he waters today?	(Q109)
🎯 Kavya scores 480 points across 8 levels of a game equally. She completes 3 levels before lunch. How many points did she score before lunch?	(Q110)
🍎 Laleh picks 360 apples in 6 days equally. She packs them in bags of 9. How many bags does she fill each day?	(Q111)
🧃 Mahesh buys 4 litres of juice. He divides it equally into 8 glasses. He drinks 3 glasses. How many ml of juice did he drink?	(Q112)
🎪 A fair has 540 visitors over 9 days equally. Each day, visitors are split equally into 6 activity groups. How many visitors per group per day?	(Q113)
🐓 Nandini has 392 eggs. She packs them in cartons of 7. She delivers equal cartons to 8 shops. How many cartons does each shop receive?	(Q114)
🏡 Omkar tiles a floor with 432 tiles. He uses 9 tiles per row. He completes 4 rows per day. How many days will it take?	(Q115)
📦 A courier company delivers 560 parcels in 8 days equally. Each day, the deliveries are split among 7 delivery people. How many parcels does each person deliver per day?	(Q116)
💐 Puja arranges 315 flowers in vases. Each vase holds 7 flowers. She places equal vases on 9 tables. How many vases per table?	(Q117)
🧮 Renu has 480 rupees. She spends equal amounts over 8 weeks. She saves half of what she spends each week. How much does she save per week?	(Q118)
🌊 A boat travels 540 km in 9 days equally. It uses 6 litres of fuel per km. How many litres does it use in 3 days?	(Q119)
🎓 Sheela scores 720 marks across 9 subjects equally. She needs 70 marks per subject to pass. By how many marks per subject does she exceed the passing mark?	(Q120)
